title: cupania inaequilatera
intro: Cupania inaequilatera is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the cupania tree. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antipyretic properties. Cupania inaequilatera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its bioactive compounds and utilization in natural remedies.
